roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOT FOR CIVIL COMPROMISE (PC1377/78) FILED

/CAL:CIVIL COMPROMISE/DAWT/X:PURSUANT TO 1378 OF THE PENAL CODE AND DUE TOAN AGREED UPON CIVIL COMPROMISE, THE COURT ORDERS ALL PROCEEDINGS TO BE STAYED UPON THE PROSECUTION, AND THE DEFENDANT IS DISCHARGED,/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SA1:AHMED TAZICHARKI AND SHAHADA TAZICHARKI/X:CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER WAS FILED ON 11-20-14,  DEFENDANT IS PERSONALLY SERVED WITH CPO IN OPEN COURT TODAY,/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/987,2/X:COUNSEL RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR,/WIT SWORN D:KHADISA SHABAZZ/X:DA RETAINS THE RIGHT TO MODIFY STAY AWAY ORDER,/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/SA1:AHMED TAZICHARKI AND SHAHANDA TAZICHARKI/DEF:LEFT THE COURT ROOM PRIOR FILING OF THE STAY AWAY ORDER/CTORD:STAY AWAY IS IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT AS OF TODAY/CONTD:PRETRIAL AND SERVING STAY AWAY ORDER/DOPC
